Name: LookAtParam
Description: Determines the parameters relating to look-at cameras.

Fields.Name: Control Bone Name
Fields.Description: Bone name to apply to.

Fields.Name: Enable Rotation on X-Axis
Fields.Description: If ON, rotation of the X-axis is enabled for the look-at camera.

Fields.Name: Enable Rotation on Y-Axis
Fields.Description: If ON, rotation of the Y-axis is enabled for the look-at camera.

Fields.Name: Flip Rotation
Fields.Description: If ON, the rotation start position is flipped by 180 degrees.

Fields.Name: Adjust Look-At Direction with Muzzle Position
Fields.Description: If ON, the look-at direction is corrected by the muzzle position.

Fields.Name: Upwards Limit Angle
Fields.Description: The upwards limit angle for the look-at camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Downwards Limit Angle
Fields.Description: The downwards limit angle for the look-at camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Rotation Speed per Second (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation velocity to apply per second on the X-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Angular Acceleration (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The angular acceleration on the X-axis to apply. In degrees per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Offset Reference Dummy Polgon ID
Fields.Description: The dummy polygon ID to use when correcting the Look-At direction. Applies for the discrepency between the rotation axis and the muzzle position. (-1 is used for the weapon shoot dummy polygon).

Fields.Name: Left Limit Angle
Fields.Description: The leftward limit angle for the look-at camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Right Limit Angle
Fields.Description: The rightward limit angle for the look-at camera. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Maximum Rotation Speed per Second (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The maximum rotation velocity to apply per second on the Y-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Angular Acceleration (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The angular acceleration on the Y-axis to apply. In degrees per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: LookAt Height Peek Duration
Fields.Description: The minimum duration to look ahead for the height target view position. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Reference Position Height Offset
Fields.Description: The reference position to use when calculating the direction for a location shifted by this value on the Y-axis from the rotation axis.

Fields.Name: Target Prediction: Speed Observation Time
Fields.Description: The duration for which a target is observed for, over the specified velocity, for target prediction.

Fields.Name: Target Prediction: Bullet ID
Fields.Description: The bullet ID used for target predicition.

Fields.Name: Target Prediction: Maximum Duration
Fields.Description: The maximum duration later that a target position can be predicted for.

Fields.Name: Target Prediction: Weapon Slot Number
Fields.Description: The weapone equipment slot number to use for the target predicition (attack action).

Fields.Name: Orbit Root Bone
Fields.Description: If ON, the control mode for orbiting comes from the root bone of the character.

Fields.Name: Fade-Out Duration
Fields.Description: The fade out duration if Look-At is disabled.

Fields.Name: Deflect Type
Fields.Description: The deflect type to use.

Fields.Name: Follow Look-At Position
Fields.Description: If ON, the Look-At target position is followed after velocity and acceleration.

Fields.Name: Fix the X-Axis Rotation relative to World
Fields.Description: If ON, the X-axis rotation for Look-At is fixed relative to the World.

Fields.Name: Fix the Y-Axis Rotation relative to World
Fields.Description: If ON, the Y-axis rotation for Look-At is fixed relative to the World.

Fields.Name: World Fix: Fixed Rotation Offset (X-Axis)
Fields.Description: The fixed offset angle to use for the world fix on the X-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: World Fix: Fixed Rotation Offset (Y-Axis)
Fields.Description: The fixed offset angle to use for the world fix on the Y-axis. In degrees.

Fields.Name: Track Target Position: Base Dummy Polygon ID
Fields.Description: The reference dummy polygon ID to use for the track target position mode.

Fields.Name: Track Target Position: Acceleration
Fields.Description: The acceleration towards the target in track target position mode. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Track Target Position: Deceleration
Fields.Description: The deceleration in directions other than the target in track target position mode. In metres per second ^ 2.

Fields.Name: Track Target Position: Maximum Velocity
Fields.Description: The maximum velocity in track target position mode. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Rotation %: X-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation rate to apply to X-axis rotation. 1 is the target direction, cumulative total from the parent joint.

Fields.Name: Rotation %: Y-Axis
Fields.Description: The rotation rate to apply to Y-axis rotation. 1 is the target direction, cumulative total from the parent joint.
